name: embedchat-widget
description: Drop-in AI chat widget for any website

scripts.build: pnpm --filter=widget build && pnpm --filter=cdn-worker build && pnpm --filter=api-worker build && pnpm --filter=demo build
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter=api-worker deploy && pnpm --filter=cdn-worker deploy && pnpm --filter=demo deploy
